title: The Lord in Your Distress Attend

verses.text: The Lord in your distress attend; may Jacob’s God protect you well, and from his holy place send help and strengthen you from Zion’s hill. Trinity Psalter, 2000; alt.
May we in your salvation joy, our banners raise in God’s great name. O may the Lord fulfill your prayers and grant you all you ask of him. Trinity Psalter, 2000; alt.
And this I know: the Lord will save and his anointed one defend with saving might of his right hand, From holly heav’n an answer send. Trinity Psalter, 2000; alt.
In chariots some have confidence, and some in horse take their pride, but we boast only one defense: the name of God the Lord Most High. Trinity Psalter, 2000; alt.
